title: Dataset 开放题
rewritten_question_text: A \(200 \, \text{V}, 50 \, \text{Hz}\) single-phase induction motor has the connection diagram and winding orientations shown in the figure. MM' is the axis of the main stator winding \(M_1 M_2\) and AA' is that of the auxiliary winding \(A_1 A_2\). Directions of the winding axes indicate the direction of flux when currents in the windings are in the directions shown. Parameters of each winding are indicated. When switch S is closed, what does the motor do?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: The output voltage of a cuk converter circuit is a function of the input voltage and the duty cycle of the switching signal, represented by the variable D (ranging from 0% to 100%), where \( D = \frac{t_{on}}{t_{on} + t_{off}} \). Based on this mathematical relationship, calculate the output voltage of this converter circuit at a duty cycle D = 25%, assuming an input voltage of 40 volts. The output voltage is ______ V.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: Two 4-ray signal constellations are shown. It is given that \(\phi_1\) and \(\phi_2\) constitute an orthonormal basis for the two constellations. Assume that the four symbols in both constellations are equiprobable. Let \(\frac{N_0}{2}\) denote the power spectral density of white Gaussian noise. If these constellations are used for digital communications over an AWGN channel, how do their probabilities of symbol error compare?
expected_answer: Probability of symbol error for Constellation 1 is lower

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: A single-phase full-bridge voltage source inverter feeds a purely inductive load, as shown in the figure, where \(T_1, T_2, T_3, T_4\) are power transistors and \(D_1, D_2, D_3, D_4\) are feedback diodes.
